name: Caramel-Date Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. Mix brown sugar, butter or margarine, and shortening in a bowl.
3. Stir in 1 3/4 cups flour, oats, salt, and baking powder until combined.
4. Remove 2 cups of this mixture; set aside. Press the remaining mixture into an ungreased rectangle pan (13x9x2 inches).
5. In a pot over low heat, cook dates, water, and sugar for about 10 minutes, stirring constantly until thickened. Set aside to cool.
6. Spread the cooked date mixture evenly over the pressed layer in the pan.
7. Heat caramel candies until melted and spread over the top of the date mixture.
8. Sprinkle reserved oat mixture and flaked coconut on top.
9. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Cut into bars, 2x1 1/2 inches while warm.
